theme.label: Theme
language.label: Language
gate.title: Connect to your backend
gate.desc: Point the admin panel at your PartyGame worker before managing the platform.
overview.title: Overview
operations.title: Operations
operations.desc: Upload and manage game hotfix assets in R2.
operations.hotfixHint: Enable Hot updates under Settings before clients can fetch patches.
settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Connection, game-type preset selector, and per-feature toggles. Clients only see enabled features.
settings.featuresHint: Backend stores feature flags only. Changing any toggle shows Custom here. Clients use GET /api/platform → features only.
preset.title: Game type
preset.hint: Admin-only. Choosing a type updates feature flags on the backend. Custom appears when toggles do not match any template.
preset.actionDesc: Voice, chat, matchmaking, leaderboard, friends, profile, hot updates.
preset.cardDesc: Text chat, friends, profile, leaderboard, hot updates. No voice or matchmaking.
preset.coopDesc: Voice, text, friends, profile, hot updates. Fixed groups — no public matchmaking or leaderboard.
preset.sportsDesc: Voice, matchmaking, leaderboard, profile, hot updates. Light text chat.
preset.sandboxDesc: Text, friends, profile, hot updates. No voice, matchmaking, or leaderboard.
preset.customNote: Feature flags were edited manually and do not match a template. Pick a type above to apply a bundle.
settings.tokenHint: Must match ADMIN_TOKEN on the worker.
features.title: Live features
hotfix.disabled: Hot updates are disabled. Enable them in Settings → Live features.
runtime.title: Runtime
api.title: API surface
meta.title: PartyGame Admin
meta.description: Manage platform features, game type presets, and hotfixes.
